title: GrowGeneration (GRWG) Reports Q2 2024 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
text: GrowGeneration Corp reported a sequential net revenue increase of 11.7% from the first quarter, reaching $53.5 million. The company posted revenues of $53.54 million for the quarter ended June 2024, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.01%, compared to year-ago revenues of $63.93 million. Gross Margin was 27%, a 110 basis point improvement from the previous quarter. Net Loss was $5.9 million or negative $0.1 per share, compared to a net loss of $5.7 million or negative $0.09 per share in the prior year. Adjusted EBITDA loss was $1.1 million, a $1.7 million improvement from Q1 2024. Same-Store Sales was $41.1 million, a decrease of 6.2% year-over-year. Proprietary Brand Sales increased to 21.5% of cultivation and gardening net sales from 16.7% in the same period last year. The company revised full year 2024 revenue guidance to $190 million to $195 million. GrowGeneration announced that 19 stores would be closed in 2024, with 7 already closed in the first half of the year, leaving 31 operational stores.
